fixtures.input_condition: allowed source provides explicit neutral panel topology fields
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve explicit topology candidate with provenance; do not infer missing surfaces or compartments

fixtures.input_condition: only a post-design allocation label or completed-reference derivative suggests a panel arrangement
fixtures.expected_behavior: reject the label as generator authority and retain safe unresolved topology state

fixtures.input_condition: source dimension is ambiguous or an exact cabinet size lacks explicit source/library authority
fixtures.expected_behavior: reject ambiguous dimension strings and avoid selecting an exact cabinet size

fixtures.input_condition: placement request lacks explicit or approved clearance authority
fixtures.expected_behavior: do not invent clearance; mark component unplaceable when clearance is required but unsupported

fixtures.input_condition: a soft objective would prefer a placement that violates containment, overlap, or edge-clearance constraints
fixtures.expected_behavior: reject the placement and report hard-constraint reason codes
